channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in CSS (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in CSS nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 vybenetwork/solana-pyth-api (223 ⭐)

item.title: 📝 CodeDrobe/skills (217 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: CodeDrobe

📝 Repository: CodeDrobe/skills

📄 Descrizione: Agent Skills for theming AI desktop apps: reference image → reversible Codex/WorkBuddy skin → verify, repair, publish. | 给 AI 桌面应用换肤的 Agent Skills：参考图 → 可逆皮肤 → 验证、修复、发布。

⭐ Stelle: 217

🍴 Forks: 17

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

🏷️ Topics: agent-skills ai-agents ai-coding chrome-devtools-protocol claude-code codex desktop-customization electron openai-codex theming

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-15T20:36:32Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-21T04:49:26Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 Danielreedyel/sha256-bench (17 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Danielreedyel

📝 Repository: Danielreedyel/sha256-bench

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight benchmarking utility for comparing SHA-256 hashing performance across different file sizes and memory buffers. Includes timing reports, checksum validation and command-line options for educational use.
